items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for automatic photo quality checks.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific requirement for an automatic photo quality check, but the provided evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case outlines the need for an automatic photo quality check, there are no specific endpoints or entities mentioned that would allow for a definitive validation of this requirement. Therefore, the evidence is inconclusive regarding whether the requirement is satisfied.
